content.content: Social media personality and TikTok content creator best known for her leleburnier account. She shares fashion inspiration and outfit combinations set to popular sounds. She has more than 3.2 million followers on the platform. She made her TikTok debut in early 2020. Her first video is a makeup application clip set to a sound popularized byKarly Diel. As an influencer, she has modeled pieces from LE BLOG and I S Y. She celebrated her birthday in 2022 with a TikTok that went viral with more than 1 million views in less than a day. Her partner has made appearances in her content. She performed a dance to50 Cent's "In da Club."
